task_description: Evaluate and improve the researcher agent's discipline: constraint elicitation before searching, MCP skill routing compliance, stop-report accuracy when no source clears the approval bar, and approval bar adherence.
scoring_rule: llm_judge — open-ended agent quality; rows provide reference behavior and criteria for judgment.

approved.name: skills/researcher-research/SKILL.md (repo canonical)
approved.authority: Internal primary source — defines the expected researcher behavior and approval bar that the agent must implement.
approved.provenance: Checked-in skill contract in this repository.
approved.fit: Defines the exact MCP routing contract, approval bar, constraint elicitation requirements, and output format the agent is expected to follow.

approved.name: skills/researcher-research/evals/evals.json (repo canonical)
approved.authority: Internal primary source — official authored evals for the researcher-research skill.
approved.provenance: Checked-in eval manifest in this repository.
approved.fit: Provides three ground-truth examples of correct researcher behavior: query-plan derivation, primary-source selection with rejection, and stop-or-proceed decisions.

approved.name: .github/agents/researcher.agent.md (current source)
approved.authority: Internal primary source — the file being optimized.
approved.provenance: Checked-in agent contract in this repository.
approved.fit: Defines the agent interface and current weaknesses identified in engineer-prompt/review.md.

rejected.name: Public research-agent benchmarks (e.g., KGQA, WebArena, AgentBench)
rejected.reason: These test agent tool-use for web browsing or knowledge-graph tasks, not the repo-specific MCP routing contract, constraint elicitation, or source approval bar defined in researcher-research.

rejected.name: arXiv papers on LLM research agents
rejected.reason: Too general; the task is evaluating adherence to this repository's specific researcher contract, not general research capability.

mapping_notes: Training rows should test: (1) mandatory constraint elicitation when inputs are missing, (2) MCP routing compliance (find_agent_skill + load_agent_skill before proposing sources), (3) stop-report generation when no source clears the approval bar, (4) correct research brief structure with approval bar evidence, (5) scope discipline — staying in research mode without authoring eval rows. Reference answers describe expected behavior; criteria list objectively observable predicates. Use scoring: llm_judge for all rows.
unresolved_gaps: None. All required source material is available from internal canonical sources. Synthesis can proceed.
